/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/src/ArgumentParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/src/BuildDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/src/Builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/src/DependencyResolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/src/GitRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/src/Installer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blatman.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o -o blatman  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::
